parameters.content:
## Nexa Master Performance Workflow

**8-step intelligence loop** — runs daily 07:00 Riyadh (04:00 UTC)

- All ad accounts per channel
- Claude Haiku data guard
- BQ ↔ HubSpot reconciliation (<2% delta)
- growth-analyst → performance-lead → ai-orchestrator
- Approval gate: #approvals channel

**Phase 1** — Collect from all accounts
Meta×2, Snap×2, TikTok×2, Google×2, MS×2, LinkedIn×1, HubSpot

**Phase 2** — Data guard (Claude Haiku) → BQ MERGE
BQ ↔ HubSpot reconciliation (7-day, <2% delta)

**Phase 4** — #approvals digest + Asana tasks
Step 6 MONITOR + Step 8 FORECAST

parameters.sqlQuery:
{{ `
SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS already_loaded
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.campaigns_daily\`
WHERE date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY channel
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:1000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:`:rotating_light: *Daily ETL Guard FAILED — ${$('Set Dates').first().json.yesterday}*\nReason: ${$('Parse Guard').first().json.reason}\nFlags: ${($('Parse Guard').first().json.flags||[]).join(', ')}` }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
{{ `
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%meta%'       THEN 'meta'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%google%'     THEN 'google_ads'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%snapchat%'   THEN 'snapchat'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%tiktok%'     THEN 'tiktok'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%linkedin%'   THEN 'linkedin'
    WHEN LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) LIKE '%microsoft%'  THEN 'microsoft_ads'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS channel,
  SUM(leads_total) AS bq_leads
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.hubspot_leads_module_daily\`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY channel
ORDER BY bq_leads DESC
` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups:[{ filters:[{ propertyName:'createdate', operator:'GTE', value:String(new Date($('Set Dates').first().json.start_7d).getTime()) }]}], properties:['email','createdate'], limit:200 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:`:warning: *BQ↔HubSpot reconciliation gap — ${$('Set Dates').first().json.yesterday}*\n${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.alert_msg}\nBQ: ${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.bq_total} leads | HubSpot: ${$('Reconcile BQ vs HS').first().json.hs_total} leads` }) }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT channel,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),2) AS spend,
  SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
  SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)),2) AS cpl,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(leads_qualified),0)),2) AS cpql,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(leads_qualified),NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0))*100,1) AS qual_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(all_revenue_won),NULLIF(SUM(spend),0)),2) AS roas,
  SUM(new_biz_deals_won) AS deals_won,
  ROUND(SUM(new_biz_revenue_won),2) AS revenue_won
FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.wide_ads`
WHERE date = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY channel ORDER BY spend DESC

WITH base AS (
  SELECT channel,
    CASE
      WHEN date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 8 DAY) THEN 'A_prior'
      WHEN date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 'B_this'
    END AS period,
    spend, leads_total, leads_qualified, leads_open, all_revenue_won, new_biz_deals_won
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.wide_ads`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY)
)
SELECT channel, period,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),0) AS spend,
  SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
  SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(leads_qualified),0)),2) AS cpql,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(all_revenue_won),NULLIF(SUM(spend),0)),2) AS roas,
  SUM(new_biz_deals_won) AS deals_won
FROM base WHERE period IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY channel, period ORDER BY channel, period

SELECT channel, campaign_name, ad_name,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),0) AS spend_14d,
  SUM(leads_total) AS hs_leads,
  SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(leads_disqualified),NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0))*100,1) AS disq_pct,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MIN(date),DAY) AS days_active,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(spend) > 70 AND SUM(leads_total) = 0 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MIN(date),DAY) >= 7 THEN 'PAUSE_ZERO_CONV'
    WHEN SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(leads_disqualified),NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)) >= 0.60 AND SUM(leads_total) >= 5 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MIN(date),DAY) >= 10 THEN 'PAUSE_JUNK'
    WHEN SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)) > 50 AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MIN(date),DAY) >= 10 THEN 'PAUSE_HIGH_CPL'
    WHEN ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(leads_qualified),0)),2) < 85 AND SUM(leads_qualified) >= 2 THEN 'SCALE'
    ELSE 'WATCH'
  END AS recommendation
FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.wide_ads`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY channel, campaign_name, ad_name
HAVING SUM(spend) > 5
ORDER BY spend_14d DESC LIMIT 60

{{ `
SELECT action_type, target_name, target_id, channel, event_date, outcome,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), event_date, DAY) AS days_since
FROM \`${$vars.BQ_PROJECT}.${$vars.BQ_DATASET}.agent_activity_log\`
WHERE action_type IN ('pause','scale','create')
  AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), event_date, DAY) IN (7,14)
  AND (outcome IS NULL OR outcome = '')
ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 20
` }}

SELECT channel,
  ROUND(SUM(spend)/7*30,0) AS proj_spend,
  ROUND(SUM(leads_total)/7*30,0) AS proj_leads,
  ROUND(SUM(leads_qualified)/7*30,0) AS proj_sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend),NULLIF(SUM(leads_qualified),0)),2) AS cpql_7d,
  SUM(new_biz_deals_won) AS deals_won_7d,
  ROUND(SUM(new_biz_revenue_won),2) AS revenue_won_7d
FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.wide_ads`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY channel ORDER BY proj_spend DESC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:4000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:6000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_NOTIFY, text:$json.digest, unfurl_links:false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel:$vars.SLACK_CHANNEL_APPROVALS, text:$('Build · ai-orchestrator').first().json.digest, unfurl_links:false }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return ($('Build · ai-orchestrator').first().json.asana_tasks || []).map(t => ({ json: t }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens:4000, system:$json.system, messages:$json.messages, tools:$json.tools, tool_choice:{type:'any'} }) }}

parameters.content:
## KPI Decision Tree

**KPI Evaluator** reads yesterday's channel-level data
and emits one flag per issue:

- `roas` → Sub-Flow A (ROAS & Channel Health)
- `cpql` → Sub-Flow C (CPQL Fix)
- `cpl` → Sub-Flow B (CPL Fix)
- `qual` → Sub-Flow D (Qual Ratio Fix)
- `is` → Sub-Flow E (Impression Share Fix)
- `ctr` → Sub-Flow F (Creative Fix)

Thresholds: ROAS<1x, CPQL>$60, CPL>$25, Qual<45%
All results → Merge → Wait — ai-orchestrator

## Nexa Master Performance Workflow

**8-step intelligence loop** — runs daily 07:00 Riyadh (04:00 UTC)

- All ad accounts per channel
- Claude Haiku data guard
- BQ ↔ HubSpot reconciliation (<2% delta)
- growth-analyst → performance-lead → ai-orchestrator
- Approval gate: #approvals channel

**Phase 1** — Collect from all accounts
Meta×2, Snap×2, TikTok×2, Google×2, MS×2, LinkedIn×1, HubSpot

**Phase 2** — Data guard (Claude Haiku) → BQ MERGE
BQ ↔ HubSpot reconciliation (7-day, <2% delta)

**Phase 4** — #approvals digest + Asana tasks
Step 6 MONITOR + Step 8 FORECAST
